nasb.text: When those who were around Him saw what was going to happen, they said, “Lord, shall we strike with the sword?”

esv.text: And when those who were around him saw what would follow, they said, “Lord, shall we strike with the sword?”

cnv.text: 左右的人見了，就說：“主啊，我們用刀砍好嗎？”

ccb.text: 跟随耶稣的人见他们来势汹汹，就说：“主啊，我们该拔刀抵抗吗？”

csbs.text: 耶稣周围的人看到要发生的事，就说：“主啊，我们要用刀砍吗？”
